description: Canonical IR metrics for Secure RAG retrieval evaluation. Metrics are computed from the self-contained retrieval artifact. No retrieval, embedding, or LLM calls were performed.

metric_definitions.hit_rate: Proportion of queries where ground truth record appears in top-k
metric_definitions.precision: Proportion of retrieved chunks in top-k that are relevant
metric_definitions.recall: Proportion of all relevant chunks that were retrieved in top-k
metric_definitions.mrr: Mean Reciprocal Rank: average of 1/rank_of_first_relevant across queries
